name: opencairn
description: OpenCairn — Park, Pickup, Flow. Session chaining, daily/weekly/quarterly review loops, and a cross-model audit panel for Claude Code + Obsidian.

plugins.name: opencairn
plugins.description: Skills for Claude Code: park/pickup session chaining, morning/afternoon/goodnight day loops, weekly & quarterly reviews, a five-layer cross-model audit panel, and PKM utilities. Designed to pair with the OpenCairn NIPARAS vault, but the skills install standalone.
